title: Shanks Destroys the Kid Pirates
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as Shanks crushes Kid near Elbaf, showing how violently the race for the One Piece has accelerated.
scene: Shanks crushes Kid near Elbaf, showing how violently the race for the One Piece has accelerated.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A few hours earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is a bit of a pickle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: York's plan?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government isn't just after the Stella...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're apparently looking to eliminate me too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luckily, I had a contingency plan, just in case they decided to play it this way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For starters, I want you to wipe out all the pests around here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can kill everyone now that the frontier dome is up again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: spare no one except for the Stella, the Hostages underground, and me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Understood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: When you guys go rogue,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure it'll trigger a "who Dunmit" style invest- gather.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If my cover gets blown, I won't stand a chance in a fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So to ensure they don't catch me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: S-snake, I want you to get me in front of everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: under- stood.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be sure to free me when no-one's looking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Got it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and one more thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's an area of the lab that I don't want you to damage, it's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: okay then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let the Hunt begin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Crumble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hurry! Everyone onto the ships!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're getting the heck out of here!!

summary: This part advances the World Events / Elbaf Sea through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
